theme.rationale: Cream is specified as the primary canvas for this premium kids lifestyle brand. No dark backgrounds behind body content.

typography.instructions: Import these via next/font/google with display: swap in the root layout.

display.usage: Headings, Hero Text, Premium Banners. Adds a warm, rounded, and friendly feel appropriate for a kids brand.

body.usage: Body text, UI elements, labels, buttons. Highly legible and clean.

brand_navy.usage: Primary text, logo wordmark, headers, footer background.

brand_gold.usage: Accents, '&' in Jack & Jill, premium secondary CTAs, borders, dividers.

brand_gradient.usage: Warm gradient for banners, badges, sale tags, and primary 'Hero' CTAs. Kid-friendly warm sunset feel.

cream.usage: Primary page background. No dark backgrounds behind body content.

spacing.philosophy: Generous whitespace. Single-brand curated feel, avoiding dense marketplace looks.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E2A4A] text-white hover:bg-[#1E2A4A]/90 transition-transform active:scale-95 rounded-[16px] px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary_gold: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#C9992E] text-[#C9992E] hover:bg-[#C9992E] hover:text-white transition-all rounded-[16px] px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.hero_cta: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E63946] via-[#F4A63E] to-[#F7D34C] text-white hover:opacity-90 transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 rounded-[16px] px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-lg

cards.product: bg-white rounded-[16px] p-4 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 group cursor-pointer
cards.category: bg-white rounded-[20px] p-6 text-center shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all
cards.testimonial: bg-[#FFF9F2] border border-[#C9992E]/20 rounded-[16px] p-6 shadow-sm

badges.sale: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E63946] to-[#F4A63E] text-white text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full
badges.new: bg-[#2E9E5B] text-white text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full
badges.oos: bg-[#6B7280] text-white text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#1E2A4A] text-white py-4 transition-all
navigation.hamburger_panel: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#FFF9F2] text-[#1E2A4A] transform transition-transform duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)]
navigation.cart_drawer: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 z-50 w-full md:w-96 bg-[#FFF9F2] shadow-2xl transform transition-transform duration-500
navigation.mobile_filters: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 z-50 rounded-t-[20px] bg-white shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] p-6 transform transition-transform

stepper.line: absolute top-1/2 left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-[#6B7280]/30 -z-0
stepper.line_progress: absolute top-1/2 left-0 h-0.5 bg-[#2E9E5B] -z-0 transition-all duration-500

homepage.hero: Full width Carousel (images/videos) overlayed with gradient CTA and Fraunces typography. Content centered or left-aligned depending on image composition.
homepage.categories: Horizontally scrollable or grid of rounded avatars/cards representing age-groups and types.
homepage.most_loved: Product shelf (carousel or grid). Generous gaps.
homepage.trust_badges: Strip of icons (Free Shipping, Instant Replacement, 22 Years Trust) across the layout.

plp.container: Grid layout. Left sidebar for filters on desktop (w-64), product grid on right (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). Mobile relies on a bottom-sheet drawer for filters.

pdp.container: Two-column grid on desktop (images on left, details on right). Sticky product details on scroll. Single column on mobile.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over brand-navy and brand-gradient meets APCA guidelines. Ensure gold accents are accessible against cream background.
accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all mobile interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. E.g., `data-testid="add-to-cart-button"`.

hero.description: Happy kids playing, ideal for hero background.

categories.description: Baby essentials basket for category card

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the brand color tokens. Do not introduce purple, violet, or generic AI gradients.
Use 'Fraunces' for display/headings and 'DM Sans' for body text. Do not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk.
Ensure all interactive components use the specified border-radii (12-20px) to maintain a soft, playful, yet premium aesthetic.
Leverage the cream background (--bg-cream: #FFF9F2) as the primary canvas for all pages.
Do not use dense, generic marketplace layouts. Keep it curated, breathable, and boutique-style.
Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fade+slide reveals and smooth page transitions (GPU-accelerated).
Cart must be implemented as a slide-in drawer on the right side.
Mobile filters must be a bottom-sheet drawer.
Hamburger menu must include a horizontally scrollable rounded-avatar carousel for categories.
All JS/React components should use `.js` or `.jsx` extensions as specified.
Implement the animated order tracking stepper in the UI.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not create generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but avoid dark backgrounds behind text content in this specific app.
Never apply universal transitions (e.g., `transition: all`). Target specific properties to prevent transform bugs.
Do not center align the app container in global CSS.
Avoid using emoji characters (🤖, etc.) for icons. Use lucide-react or phosphor-icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus rings, etc.).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults.
